channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: George Mason sets NCAA Division I record for most runs scored in inning
item.description: George Mason scored 23 runs in one inning during Tuesday's game against the Holy Cross Crusaders and set an NCAA Division I record in the process
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Piedmont neutralizes Oakland Tech’s height advantage, wins NorCal opener in a stunning rout
item.description: Freshman Janelle Solis leads Piedmont past Oakland Tech in NorCal Division I regional. 'She’s better than advertised,' Tech coach says.
item.dc:creator: Devin Bradshaw, correspondent, The Mercury News

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Roki Sasaki pitches 3 scoreless innings in his spring debut with the Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Roki Sasaki pitched three scoreless innings for the Los Angeles Dodgers in his spring training debut against the Cincinnati Reds on Tuesday night. Sasaki allowed two hits, struck out five and walked one. The right-hander threw 46 pitches, 26 for strikes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agree on $80M, 4-year contract, agent says
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agreed Tuesday on an $80 million, four-year contract with $58 million guaranteed, his agent said. The agreement came a few hours before the deadline for clubs to apply the franchise tag on one player.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings decline franchise tag option for Sam Darnold despite breakout season: report
item.description: While Sam Darnold largely thrived his first season with the Vikings, the quarterback's future in Minnesota is murky after the team opted against using its franchise tag for him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Soccer CIFSDS Open Division Championship: San Marcos 2, Bonita Vista 1
item.description: The CIFSDS Open Division Girls Soccer Championship was held at Mission Bay High School between the San Marcos Knights (17-4-3) and the Bonita Vista Barons (12-5-2).
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Houston clinches Big 12 regular-season title with 73-64 win over Cincinnati
item.description: L.J. Cryer scored 20 points and No. 4 Houston clinched the outright Big 12 regular-season title for a second straight season with a 73-64 win over Cincinnati on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts high-stakes CONCACAF Champions Cup match up with CS Herediano
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns home for a decisive CONCACAF Champions Cup showdown against CS Herediano on Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
